channel.title: Decantika — All Clones, Designers & Niche Copy
channel.description: Latest clone/designer/niche copy decant listings at Decantika

item.title: Khamrah Waha - Lattafa - 1ml Decant Spray Sample
item.description:
Vendor: Lattafa
Type: Lattafa
Price: 2.49

Khamrah Waha by Lattafa 

1ml Decant Spray Sample

 

 
Scent profile:

 


Fragance Notes:

- Top: Bergamot, Juniper, Yuzu, Ginger

- Heart: Cucumber, Sea Salt, Sage, Iris

- Base: Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Ambrofix, Akigalawood, Musk

 

Information:

Concentration: Eau de Parfum

Olfactive Notes: Citrus, Fresh Spicy, Aromatic, Vanilla, Woody, Powdery, Ozonic, Aquatic, Green, Sweet

Target Gender: Unisex 

Recommended for: Cold temperatures. Fall, Winter

 

Disclaimer:

Decantika is an independent decanting service and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any brand or designer. All decants are rebottled from 100% authentic, original fragrances into smaller spray bottles for sampling and personal use only.

item.title: Celerio Epic - Dumont - 1ml Decant Spray Sample
item.description:
Vendor: Dumont
Type: Dumont
Price: 2.49

Celerio Epic by Dumont

1ml Decant Spray Sample

Reminds of: Angels Share by Kilian

 

Scent Profile:

 

 

Fragrance Notes:

Top: Cinnamon, Cognac, Apple, Nutmeg

Heart: Plum, Dry Wood 

Base: Vanilla, Musk

 

Info:

Concentration: Eau De Parfum

Olfactive Family: Fruity, Vanilla, Warm Spicy, Woody, Cinnamon, Sweet, Powdery

Target Gender: Unisex

Recommended for: Cold Temperatures. Fall, Winter, Spring. 

 

Disclaimer:

Decantika is an independent decanting service and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any brand or designer. All decants are rebottled from 100% authentic, original fragrances into smaller spray bottles for sampling and personal use only.

1ml Decant Spray Sample

Fragance Notes:

- Top: Ambrette, Naseberry

- Heart: Magnolia, Sandalwood, Violet

- Base: Cedarwood, Vetiver, Musk

 

Information:

Olfactive Notes: Floral, Woody, Powdery, Violet, Musky, Fruity, Amber, Citrus

Recommended for: Warm Temperatures, Spring, Summer, Fall

 

Disclaimer:

Decantika is an independent decanting service and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any brand or designer. All decants are rebottled from 100% authentic, original fragrances into smaller spray bottles for sampling and personal use only.
